title: GROUP_LIST: member_counts_for_user failure silently uses empty map, understating member counts
description: ws.rs GROUP_LIST handler: if member_counts_for_user() returns Err, the code uses an empty HashMap (line 1628-1630) and warns. All group member_counts in the response become 0, which is silently wrong data. The client sees groups with 0 members and cannot tell if it is real or a transient DB error. Should return an internal error instead of silently presenting stale/wrong data.
